introSection: Big Apple is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently owned and travelled by UK showman Bailey McKay.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The roller coaster began operating in July 1998 under ownership of Ervin Gamble. The ride has attended the Kirkcaldy Links Market regularly since 2008 (or earlier).

In August 2022, the ride was sold to Bailey McKay.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has the Wacky Worm layout.

fullText:
Big Apple is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently owned and travelled by UK showman Bailey McKay.

The roller coaster began operating in July 1998 under ownership of Ervin Gamble. The ride has attended the Kirkcaldy Links Market regularly since 2008 (or earlier).

In August 2022, the ride was sold to Bailey McKay.

The ride has the Wacky Worm layout.
